description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.24-bookworm Docker image and includes the Workflows/MergeRequest-Pipelines.gitlab-ci.yml template. Add a global before_script that sources ci/prepare.sh. Define a single stage named test. In the test stage add a test job that runs the command `make CONCURRENT_JOBS=4 -k check`. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, services, or special rules.
